The Real World
Survival Guide

a 3rd generation domer's field manual for what comes next

MAX DOW '26
01
social_defense.exe // crowd_control
Answering "So What's Your Plan?"
▶
🎬
The FTT Deflect: "I'm developing a project right now." Full stop. Nobody on earth will ask a follow-up. You are untouchable. WORKS 100%
🏊
The Swimmer Card: Casually mention you were a competitive swimmer. People will spend the next 20 minutes asking about your times and totally forget what they originally asked. RELIABLE
🍗
The Wing Critic Gambit: "I'm a food journalist." You literally ran a wing review website rating 50+ restaurants nationally. This is not a lie. CERTIFIED TRUE
😐
Nuclear Option: "Still figuring it out one day at a time." Stare directly into their eyes. They will leave first. LAST RESORT
02
nd_campus_debrief.exe // 3rd_gen_edition
Things Only a Domer Would Understand
▶
🐿️
Campus squirrels: Some people love them, some are mildly disturbed by them. Either way — they're absolutely massive because everyone feeds them. They have no fear. They own this campus and they know it. CHONKY MENACE
🌙
Late-night lake walks: Cold, slightly surreal, philosophically unhinged — this is peak Notre Dame. Nothing in the real world will ever replicate that specific feeling. Cherish it.
⏰
Parietals: Gone. Forever. For everyone else. You figured that one out your senior year anyway. MOOT POINT
🏟️
3rd generation Domer: You didn't just graduate — you completed a family arc that spans decades. That's genuinely cinematic. Your FTT brain knows this.
🥗
North vs South Dining Hall: The debate is over. You graduated. It doesn't matter anymore. (It's North and everyone knows it.)
03
industry_survival.exe // screenwriter_edition
Breaking Into the Industry as a Screenwriter
▶
☕
The First Chapter: You will do a lot of things that aren't writing before you get paid to write. This is not failure — it's research. Every bad job is a scene you'll use later. MANDATORY
✍️
Horror is a real genre: Studios take it seriously, audiences are obsessed with it, and it's one of the few spaces where a new voice can actually break through. "Itch" could be the one. Keep going. SERIOUSLY
🎭
Your FTT background gives you an edge: You studied film specifically, which means you understand what works on screen — not just on paper. Screenwriters who know visual language write better scripts. That's you.
🎞️
Everyone has a script: At any industry event, 60% of people are about to pitch you theirs. You don't have to say yes. "Send it to me" followed by a fake email is a totally valid advanced technique.
📺
TV is not the backup plan. TV is where most of the best writing is happening right now. Don't overlook it while chasing features.
04
secret_weapons.exe // skills_you_forgot_you_have
Life Skills You Already Have (Somehow)
▶
🍌
Super Banana was real: At 8 years old you created a comic strip about healthy eating, developed it into a business with your dad, and pitched it seriously. Most adults have never done anything that entrepreneurial. You did it before high school. LEGENDARY
🏀
The basketball thing: Can dunk. Knocks down 3s. Hits from deep. This has absolutely nothing to do with screenwriting but it will win you enormous social capital in any writers' room immediately. UNDERRATED ASSET
🏊
Competitive swimmer brain: The discipline, the early mornings, the mental endurance — that's not gone just because you're out of the pool. That's the part of you that will finish the script when everyone else gives up. SECRETLY USEFUL
🍗
Wing critic credentials: A discerning palate and the confidence to rate things publicly is a personality trait. You'll never be the person at dinner who can't pick a restaurant. This is a gift.
05
finance_basics.exe // adult_money_terror
Pretending to Know What a 401k Is
▶
📊
The Nod: Someone says "401k" — nod slowly and say "yeah, gotta get on top of that." You now sound like a functioning adult. CERTIFIED
💸
What it actually is: A retirement savings account your employer partially funds if you contribute. That's it. Everyone your age is equally confused. The secret is collective ignorance and everyone is in on it.
🎟️
Student discount: deleted. Adobe Creative Cloud at full price is a hate crime against screenwriters. There is no solution. Moment of silence. RIP 2022–2026
🍕
What you keep forever: Eating at unreasonable hours. No one can stop you. This right is eternal and non-negotiable. RETAINED FOREVER
06
final_patch.exe // the_part_we_mean
The Part We Actually Mean
▶
✨
You did something genuinely hard. Four years of making things, analysing things, figuring out your voice, and deciding horror is the genre worth caring about. That's a whole journey.
🏀
You're someone who can dunk AND write a screenplay. That is a statistically unusual combination and you should feel smug about it at all times.
🏟️
Three generations of Notre Dame. You added your chapter today. Whatever comes next, that part is already done and it's kind of a big deal.
👻
Finish "Itch." Horror needs new voices. You have one. Go be embarrassingly ambitious about it.
